one_law: Plans are useful only when reachable by Brain, Hub Pro, Chat Unify, Cloudflare Workers, and Railway cloud workers through portfolio-spine Supabase.
founder_next_action: In Supabase dashboard for project ldfruywifqnfpwsfgmdl, open Project Settings -> Database.
Copy the database password or pooled connection string.
Put it in ~/.sourcea-secrets/portfolio-spine-db.env as SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD=... or SUPABASE_DB_URL=...
Alternatively run the migration SQL manually in Supabase SQL Editor.
Then run: python3 scripts/sourcea_supabase_plan_registry_import_v1.py --import --limit 100 --json for first live slice.
cloud_chain_after_import: Cloudflare Worker reads plan rows by id/status/lane.
Railway cloud worker writes execution/result rows back with service role.
Hub Pro shows plan counts and next rows.
Brain and Chat Unify retrieve plan context through public-safe read APIs.
